issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for installation and configuration failures.
The instructions assume a Linux environment with specific package managers and system services, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: Deploy VLESS+Reality for 3 users on Debian VPS
scenarios.rationale: Treatment installs via the documented install-release.sh script, generates X25519 keys with xray x25519, configures realitySettings with dest/serverNames/shortIds and xtls-rprx-vision flow per the skill, and emits the documented vless:// share link format; baseline produces a generic v2ray-style config without Reality specifics.

scenarios.name: Add and remove users at runtime without restart
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented xray api adi / xray api rmi / xray api stats commands against the dokodemo-door API inbound on 127.0.0.1:10085 with the stats policy block, while baseline edits config.json and reloads the service, disconnecting active users.
